/usr/bin/ar qc liblpc.a CMakeFiles/lpc.dir/array.c.o CMakeFiles/lpc.dir/buffer.c.o CMakeFiles/lpc.dir/class.c.o CMakeFiles/lpc.dir/compiler.c.o CMakeFiles/lpc.dir/functional.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lpc.dir/identifier.c.o CMakeFiles/lpc.dir/lex.c.o CMakeFiles/lpc.dir/mapping.c.o CMakeFiles/lpc.dir/object.c.o CMakeFiles/lpc.dir/operator.c.o CMakeFiles/lpc.dir/otable.c.o CMakeFiles/lpc.dir/regexp.c.o CMakeFiles/lpc.dir/svalue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lpc.dir/program.c.o CMakeFiles/lpc.dir/program/binaries.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lpc.dir/program/disassemble.c.o CMakeFiles/lpc.dir/program/generate.c.o CMakeFiles/lpc.dir/program/icode.c.o CMakeFiles/lpc.dir/program/parse_trees.c.o CMakeFiles/lpc.dir/grammar.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liblpc.a
